ddls:
CREATE TABLE "exposure_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exposure setting */,
  "lighting_condition" TEXT /* Condition of lighting during the photograph */,
  "aperture" TEXT /* Aperture setting for the exposure */,
  "iso" INTEGER /* ISO setting used for the exposure */,
  "shutter_speed" TEXT /* Shutter speed setting for the exposure */,
  "shadow_detail" TEXT /* Detail of shadows present in the image */,
  "white_balance" TEXT /* White balance setting for the exposure */,
  "focal_length" TEXT /* Focal length used for the exposure */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exposure setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exposure setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title or description of the image */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the image is stored */,
  "date_taken" TEXT /* Date when the image was taken */,
  "photographer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the photographer who took the image */,
  "camera_model" TEXT /* Camera model used to capture the image */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_photographer_id FOREIGN KEY ("photographer_id") REFERENCES photographers ("photographer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "photographers" (
  "photographer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photographer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the photographer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the photographer */,
  "profile" TEXT /* Profile description of the photographer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the photographer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the photographer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photographer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_exposure_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link entry */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image related to the exposure setting */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exposure setting used for this image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the link was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the link was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_exposure_links_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_exposure_links_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES exposure_settings ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis regarding the image quality */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_analysis_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Photographer) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address associated with the user account */,
  "photographer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the photographer who owns the account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_photographer_id FOREIGN KEY ("photographer_id") REFERENCES photographers ("photographer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user account associated with the session */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("account_id")
)
